verse.name: V1
verse.lines: A woman tried so many physicians, Yet grew worse, so to Jesus she came; And when the crowd tried to restrain her, She whispered these words through her pain.

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: Touching Jesus is all that really matters, Then your life will never be the same; And there's only one way to touch Him Just believe when you call on His name.

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: I was bound when I knelt at the altar, They said Jesus could meet my every need; When this prisoner finally touched Jesus, He made me free, praise His Name, I'm free indeed!
